target: ACL27 supplement page 28 material decision map v3
reason_independent_review_not_used: Subagent spawning is restricted to explicit user requests in this environment; review followed the render-visual-reviewer and research-figure-ai-slot-composer checklists locally.

measurement.layout_guard_active_definition: RGB pixels where max(channel)-min(channel) > 15 or mean(channel) < threshold, matching tests/test_paper_layout.py figure-density checks.
measurement.page_active245_definition: RGB pixels where max(channel)-min(channel) > 15 or mean(channel) < 245, matching the sparse-page density audit.
measurement.red_pixel_fraction_definition: RGB pixels where R > 150, G < 90, and B < 90, matching tests/test_paper_layout.py red fallback checks.

layout_iteration.before: The v2 decision map used a 1800 x 1940 board and a footer gate, but page 28 still had visible unused vertical space in the round36 sparse-page review.
layout_iteration.after: The v3 decision map uses a taller 1800 x 2480 board, a v2 material-decision AI gate slot, and a four-column covered-bin render matrix containing original, ConvertAsset, and NVIDIA crops for bottle, clock, cup, and backpack.
layout_iteration.ai_slot_containment_update: After the AI slot composition skill was updated to avoid cropping and occlusion, the composer was changed from cover scaling to contain scaling for MATERIAL_DECISION_GATE_AI_SLOT. The accepted evidence uses the rebuilt contain version, not the earlier cover version.
layout_iteration.result: Accepted: page 28 remains page 28 in a 45-page supplement, Figure S26 and its caption fit on the same page, and page 29 starts the navigation opener normally.

visual_review.standalone_figure: PASS: the added covered-bin render matrix makes the decision map visibly more evidence-bearing without changing the material claim boundary.
visual_review.ai_slot_asset: PASS: the raw v2 AI slot has no readable generated text and works as an exposition-only material-decision schematic.
visual_review.ai_slot_composed_crop: PASS: the composed footer crop shows the AI slot contained inside its frame with no center crop, no overlap from deterministic text cards, and no important glyphs touching the boundary.
visual_review.pdf_page_28: PASS: the page shows the expanded figure and full Figure S26 caption without clipping, overlap, or page-count spill.
visual_review.neighbor_pages: PASS: page 27 remains the material claim-boundary atlas and page 29 remains the navigation evidence opener.
visual_review.claim_boundary: PASS: the caption keeps the NVIDIA route as a selected material comparator and marks the AI material-decision gate as exposition only, not evidence for a material mechanism or converter ranking.

verification_commands: python - <<'PY' from paper.shared.figures.gen_supplement_task_media_atlases import build_material_decision_map; build_material_decision_map() PY
